country_result:
Country: Ethiopia
Coordinates: 9.0123, 38.7891
City: Addis Ababa
Continent: Africa
final_reasoning: The image shows a rural road with characteristics typical of the East African highlands. The vegetation consists of lush greenery and eucalyptus trees, common in Ethiopia. The architecture of the house on the right, with its specific roof style and the presence of a large black water storage tank, is very common in Ethiopian residential areas. The red soil (laterite) is a strong indicator of the region. Pedestrians are walking along the shoulder of a two-lane paved road with yellow dashed center lines. The sun position is high, suggesting a tropical or subtropical latitude. The overall environment, including the utility poles and the style of the perimeter walls, strongly points to the outskirts of Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.
